user.title: Add a car
user.description: Create a tracked car from its Bluetooth MAC address.

people.title: Choose drivers
people.description: Select the Home Assistant people that can drive this car.

phones.title: Choose a phone
phones.description: Select the companion-app phone to use for {person_name}. If there is only one available phone, it is preselected for you.

high_accuracy.title: High Accuracy Mode
high_accuracy.description: Android Companion High Accuracy Mode can improve live tracking while driving, but it uses more battery. Choose "Always while driving" for the most frequent updates, or "Only while driving and charging" to reduce battery drain.

data.high_accuracy_update_interval: High accuracy update interval in seconds (lower values use more battery)

error.invalid_mac: Enter a valid Bluetooth MAC address.
error.no_people: Create at least one person in Home Assistant before adding a car.
error.no_mobile_app_trackers: No mobile app phone trackers were found for the selected person.

abort.already_configured: This Bluetooth MAC address is already configured.
